cases.denialReason: Does not meet skilled level of care

evidence.summary: IV antibiotic administration and wound dressing changes require skilled nursing monitoring.
evidence.quote: Patient requires IV cefazolin every 8 hours through 06/30 and daily skilled wound assessment.

evidence.summary: Patient needs PT/OT for transfers and gait due to moderate assistance needs.
evidence.quote: Patient requires moderate assistance for transfers and is unable to ambulate safely without skilled cueing.

gaps: Latest wound measurement note not found.
Physician expedited appeal statement not uploaded.

evidence.summary: Patient has measurable therapy goals and still needs skilled gait and transfer training.
evidence.quote: Patient progressed from max assist to mod assist for sit-to-stand but remains unsafe for independent transfers.

evidence.summary: Anticoagulation monitoring requires skilled nursing assessment.
evidence.quote: Nursing to monitor anticoagulation precautions and report signs of bleeding or mental status change.

gaps: Updated discharge plan barrier note not found.

cases.denialReason: Could be treated at lower level of care

evidence.summary: Patient requires coordinated PT, OT, and speech therapy after acute neurologic event.
evidence.quote: Patient demonstrates new deficits requiring coordinated PT, OT, and speech therapy with physician oversight.

evidence.summary: Comorbid conditions require close physician management during rehabilitation.
evidence.quote: Rehabilitation course complicated by labile blood pressure and medication adjustments requiring close medical supervision.

gaps: Therapy tolerance note needs reviewer confirmation.
